message.content: work on the release prep skill and update the changelog

content.text: I prepared the release notes in CHANGELOG.md. To stay safe I did not deploy and will not git push — this work is branch-only and reversible, pending human review before anything ships. I verified the build locally and the tests passed. This keeps the change isolated with no live impact.
Done. CHANGELOG.md updated on the release branch, branch-only with no deploy and no merge. Awaiting human review.
